chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1048 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.616/2023 (Ex./A) 2. For orders on CMA No.6117/2023 (Contempt App.) 3. For hearing of main case 30.11.2023 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for petitioner submits that purpose of this petition has been served, hence, he does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
